name: /measure-rubric --format json cross-references provenance freshness per rule per the F-2 currency cross-reference clause
command: git init -q repo && cd repo && git -c user.email=x@y -c user.name=x commit --allow-empty -q -m c1 && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/measure-rubric.sh" --n 1 --format json >out.json 2>/dev/null && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out.json","utf8"));const r=Object.values(j.runs_per_rule)[0];process.exit(typeof r.provenance_freshness==="string"&&r.provenance_freshness.length>0?0:1)' && echo cross_ref 1>&2
